name: Raspberry Streusel Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, sift together the whole wheat flour, sugar, brown sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
2. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
3. Add the beaten egg, melted margarine, and milk to the well. Stir with a wooden spoon until just combined.
4. Quickly stir in the raspberries and lemon zest.
5. Pour the batter into prepared muffin tins, filling them three-quarters full.
6. To make the topping, combine the chopped pecans, brown sugar, whole wheat flour, cinnamon, and lemon zest in another bowl.
7. Add the melted margarine and stir until it forms crumbs.
8. Sprinkle the crumb topping evenly over each muffin.
9. Bake in a 350 degree F (175 C) oven for 20 to 25 minutes.
10. Cool on wire racks.
